name: Falafel (Basic Recipe)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Garbanzo Beans, cooked, drained and rinsed
1 slice Wheat Bread, crustless firm, torn into pieces
1 tbsp Tahini (Sesame Seed Paste) or Olive Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop the garlic and puree the garbanzo beans in a food processor or blender.
2. Add the remaining ingredients, except the flour, to the purée and mix well until the mixture is soft.
3. Form the mixture into 1-inch balls or patties and coat each with flour.
4. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
5. Bake the falafel for 15 to 20 minutes, turning off the heat when done.
6. To make a falafel sandwich, cut a piece of pita bread in half and place 2 to 3 falafel balls or patties into each half. Add lettuce, alfalfa sprouts, sliced tomatoes, green onions, and low-fat yogurt dressing or tahini dressing.
Yield: 5 servings (20 balls)
Nutritional Information per Serving:
- Calories: 158
- Protein: 7 g
- Fat: 5 g
- Carbohydrate: 23 g
- Fiber: 3.3 g
- Cholesterol: 0 mg
- Sodium: 341 mg
- Potassium: 237 mg
Exchange: 1-1/2 Starch/Bread, 1/2 Medium-Fat Meat
